description_long: This handbag features a rounded, slightly bulbous body with a vibrant, multicolored geometric pattern that blends shades of blue, green, orange, and purple. The main body is accented by a wide, horizontal black band running across its midsection, adding visual contrast. The bag is equipped with a single, medium-length shoulder strap attached by metal hardware, suitable for carrying over the shoulder. In one view, a matching accessory pouch with a similar pattern and a textured black flap is visible, suggesting a coordinated set. The surface of the bag appears to be made of a semi-glossy synthetic material, likely faux leather or coated fabric, with a soft but structured form. No visible brand logo or prominent hardware is present, and the closure mechanism is not clearly visible but may be a zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
description: A rounded, multicolored geometric-patterned handbag with a black horizontal band and a single shoulder strap, featuring a coordinated accessory pouch. The surface is semi-glossy and structured, with no visible brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern, black band, and the main body shape with the strap arching above.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the bag's depth, rounded contour, and the attachment of the strap.
description_view_2: Front view with a matching accessory pouch placed in front, partially obscuring the lower section of the bag.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, showing the bag's thickness and the pouch attached to the side.
attribute_strap_type: Single medium-length shoulder strap, non-adjustable, attached with metal hardware at both ends.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Closure mechanism not clearly visible; likely a zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
attribute_pattern: Multicolored geometric pattern with a wide black horizontal band.
